nasb.text: since you can take note of the fact that no more than twelve days ago I went up to Jerusalem to worship.

esv.text: You can verify that it is not more than twelve days since I went up to worship in Jerusalem,

cnv.text: 你清楚知道，自從我上耶路撒冷去禮拜，到現在還沒有十二天；

ccb.text: 大人明鉴，从我上耶路撒冷礼拜至今不过十二天。

csbs.text: 您可以了解，自从我上耶路撒冷去敬拜，到现在不超过十二天。
